description: Create a depth color-coded Z-projection of the 'FluorescentCells.tif' confocal microscopy stack to visualize 3D structure. Process the extracted Channel 2 (Green/Cytoskeleton) using background subtraction (rolling ball radius: 30 pixels) and contrast enhancement (0.3% saturated, normalized). Generate a standard Maximum Intensity Projection (MIP) saved to ~/Fiji_Data/results/depth_projection/standard_mip.png. Produce a depth color-coded RGB projection using the 'Spectrum' LUT with an added calibration bar, saving the result to ~/Fiji_Data/results/depth_projection/depth_coded_projection.png. Finally, save a text report to ~/Fiji_Data/results/depth_projection/stack_report.txt listing the original number of channels, number of Z-slices, and the LUT name used.
